text.en: During June, talk to the Curator north of the Burthorpe lodestone about "diverse stories" for a collection of stories, which can be collected in any order.
Go north of Anachronia base camp towards the entrance to the Effigy Incubator.
Pick up Vicendithas's journal from the ground and read it to add it to a collection of stories.
Go to where the Stormbreaker ship is in Varrock Dig Site.
Pick up Vicendithas's journal from the ground and read it to add it to a collection of stories.
Travel to the teleporter of Armadyl's Tower northwest of the Port Sarim lodestone.
Pick up a well-loved letter next to the teleporter and read it to add it to the journal.
Go to Edgeville, and climb the ladder to the of the house north of the Edgeville bank.
Talk to either of the characters and see what's upsetting Annette.
Go north-east of the World Gate to find Angof and a list of names.
Pick up the book and read it to add it to the journal.
Go to player-owned house portal in Taverley to find Angof and a list of names.
Pick up the book outside the Pick and Lute and read it to add it to the journal.
Go to the eastern side of Draynor Manor grounds.
Pick up Greg's journal from near a tombstone and read it to add it to the journal.
Go to Lumbridge Castle and climb down the trapdoor in the castle kitchen.
Pick up Zanik's journal just to the north and read it to add it to the journal.
Return to the Curator north of the Burthorpe lodestone and talk about "diverse stories".
